summary: Tested SBI Co-Pilot onboarding/KYC/data-management feature set. Backend: registered new user → no auto-seed (transaction_count=0, data_source=none, kyc_status=pending), /auth/me returns data_status, /onboarding/complete-kyc sets kyc=verified, /onboarding/load-demo loaded 73 demo txns + data_source=demo, /user/export-data returns full JSON, /user/reset-data deletes all financial data. Frontend: Login of KYC-pending user correctly redirected to /onboarding; KYC form submitted with data-testids; data-source step rendered; clicking onb-use-demo loaded 81 demo txns and redirected to /dashboard; status-banner shows Source: DEMO, KYC: VERIFIED, AI: OPERATIONAL; /about renders Mission/Vision/Technology with no financial metrics; /settings shows all sections (Profile, Financial, Data Management, Notifications, Privacy, Danger); reset-data flow with RESET confirm successfully wiped data and redirected to /onboarding.
passed: POST /api/auth/register creates user with kyc_status=pending, data_source=none, no auto-seeded transactions
GET /api/auth/me returns data_status {data_source, kyc_status, transaction_count, has_data}
POST /api/onboarding/load-demo loaded 73 demo transactions and set data_source=demo
POST /api/user/reset-data deletes financial data, keeps account (data_source=none, kyc preserved)
Login of KYC-pending user redirects to /onboarding
Onboarding KYC form (kyc-pan, kyc-aadhaar, kyc-dob, kyc-sbi, kyc-address, kyc-submit) works and transitions to data source step
onb-use-demo loads demo data and navigates to /dashboard
Dashboard status-banner contains DEMO, VERIFIED, OPERATIONAL labels
/about page renders Mission/Vision/Technology with no financial metrics
/settings renders all 6 sections including Danger Zone
Reset-data flow: reset-data-button -> reset-confirm-input (RESET) -> reset-confirm-button -> redirected to /onboarding
notes: Did not test full 3-step UI register flow (basic info -> OTP verify -> profile) because backend already covered registration; logged in via UI with backend-created user instead. DELETE /api/user/account endpoint was NOT executed (would invalidate session); recommend full-testing agent verify it separately. Mocked APIs noted: SMS OTP (demo_otp returned in response, fallback 123456), PDF parsing (ack-only), Bank Connect (Account Aggregator placeholder).
